campaigns.name: Partner Activation — Large Markets
campaigns.description: Un-oriented partners within 10mi of large priority markets (>300 shifts)

campaigns.name: Partner Activation — Medium Markets
campaigns.description: Un-oriented partners within 15mi of specific medium markets
